current_run.problem_name: Hidden Cyclic Product of Three Bits
current_run.description: Given an oracle for f(x), where f(x) = (x_i * x_j * x_{(i+j) mod N}) mod 2, the goal is to find the secret indices (i, j) encoded within an integer 'secret'. The indices i and j are derived from 'secret' as i = secret % N and j = (secret // N) % N. This function is non-linear, with the potential to be cubic (degree 3) depending on the chosen secret and N.
